---
title: Week notes (2026-W15)
date: 2026-04-10
date-modified: today
categories:
  - week notes
---

- Finished bringing codes into qc
- Looked at the CITF-DB marker paper again (but minimal actual contributions this time)

I'm on my way to Oslo for a workshop I'm co-organizing: [Citational Politics and Practices in Viking Age Archaeology and Beyond](https://zackbatist.info/BibVik/workshop.html). I'll be off my main CITF work throughout next week.
